'''PetVac''' was a chain of veterinary practices spread throughout the planet [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]. The company's headquarters was based in the city of [[Lola Curich]].

==Appearances==
*[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}}
